translations.en: I was at the movies recently.
translations.fr: Je suis allé au cinéma récemment.
translations.it: Sono andato al cinema di recente.
translations.pt: Fui ao cinema há pouco tempo.
translations.nl: Ik ben onlangs naar de bioscoop geweest.
translations.hi: मैं हाल ही में फिल्म देखने गया था.
translations.id: Baru-baru ini saya menonton film di bioskop.
translations.ro: Am fost la cinema de curând.
translations.da: Jeg var for nylig i biografen.
translations.ja: 最近映画を見に行きました。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite form of the copular/auxiliary verb 'sein' (preterite, 1st person singular); links the subject to the predicate complement (locative PP).
Temporal adverb modifying the clause (indicates recent past).
Contraction of preposition 'in' + definite article 'dem' (dative); introduces a dative noun phrase as part of the locative predicate complement.
Common noun, neuter singular; object of the preposition 'im' (dative), forming the locative predicate complement.

sentences.target: Wir haben kürzlich ein neues Sofa gekauft.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ ˈhaːbən ˈkʏʁtslɪç aɪ̯n ˈnɔʏ̯əs ˈzoːfa ɡəˈkaʊ̯ft/

translations.de: Wir haben kürzlich ein neues Sofa gekauft.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ ˈhaːbən ˈkʏʁtslɪç aɪ̯n ˈnɔʏ̯əs ˈzoːfa ɡəˈkaʊ̯ft/
translations.en: We recently bought a new sofa.
translations.es: Hace poco compramos un sofá nuevo.
translations.fr: On a récemment acheté un nouveau canapé.
translations.it: Di recente abbiamo comprato un divano nuovo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们最近买了一张新沙发。
translations.yue: 我哋最近買咗張新梳化。
translations.pt: Há pouco tempo compramos um sofá novo.
translations.tr: Yakın zamanda yeni bir kanepe aldık.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi mới mua một chiếc sofa mới.
translations.nl: We hebben onlangs een nieuwe bank gekocht.
translations.hi: हमने हाल ही में नया सोफ़ा खरीदा है.
translations.nb: Vi kjøpte nylig en ny sofa.
translations.id: Baru-baru ini kami membeli sofa baru.
translations.sv: Vi köpte nyligen en ny soffa.
translations.ro: Am cumpărat de curând o canapea nouă.
translations.da: Vi købte for nylig en ny sofa.
translations.ja: 最近新しいソファを買いました。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite auxiliary (present, 1st person plural) forming the present perfect together with the past participle.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb phrase.
Indefinite article, accusative neuter singular; determiner of the direct object noun.
Attributive adjective, accusative neuter singular (mixed inflection after 'ein'); modifies 'Sofa'.
Common noun, neuter singular; head of the accusative noun phrase functioning as direct object.
Past participle of the lexical verb; together with 'haben' forms the present perfect (main predicate).

sentences.target: Er ist kürzlich nach Berlin gezogen.

translations.de: Er ist kürzlich nach Berlin gezogen.
translations.es: Se mudó a Berlín hace poco.
translations.fr: Il a déménagé à Berlin récemment.
translations.it: Si è trasferito a Berlino di recente.
translations.pt: Ele se mudou para Berlim há pouco tempo.
translations.vi: Anh ấy mới chuyển đến Berlin.
translations.nl: Hij is onlangs naar Berlijn verhuisd.
translations.hi: वह हाल ही में बर्लिन चला गया.
translations.id: Dia baru-baru ini pindah ke Berlin.
translations.ro: S-a mutat de curând la Berlin.
translations.da: Han flyttede for nylig til Berlin.
translations.ja: 彼は最近ベルリンに引っ越しました。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite auxiliary (present, 3rd person singular) used with motion verbs to form the present perfect.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb phrase.
Preposition indicating direction towards a place; takes a (usually article-less) place name complement.
Proper noun (city name); object of the preposition 'nach' (destination).
Past participle of the lexical verb; with 'ist' forms the present perfect expressing motion to a new residence.

sentences.target: Die Nachbarin hat kürzlich ein Baby bekommen.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈnaxbaːʁɪn hat ˈkʏʁtslɪç aɪ̯n ˈbeːbi bəˈkɔmən/

translations.de: Die Nachbarin hat kürzlich ein Baby bekommen.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈnaxbaːʁɪn hat ˈkʏʁtslɪç aɪ̯n ˈbeːbi bəˈkɔmən/
translations.en: The neighbor recently had a baby.
translations.es: La vecina tuvo un bebé hace poco.
translations.fr: La voisine a eu un bébé récemment.
translations.it: La vicina ha avuto un bambino di recente.
translations.pt: A vizinha teve um bebê há pouco tempo.
translations.vi: Cô hàng xóm vừa sinh em bé.
translations.nl: De buurvrouw heeft onlangs een baby gekregen.
translations.hi: पड़ोसन ने हाल ही में बच्चे को जन्म दिया.
translations.el: Η γειτόνισσα γέννησε πρόσφατα ένα μωρό.
translations.ro: Vecina a născut de curând un copil.
translations.da: Naboen har for nylig fået en baby.
translations.ja: 近所の女性が最近赤ちゃんを産みました。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative feminine singular; determiner of the subject noun.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of the clause.
Finite auxiliary (present, 3rd person singular) forming the present perfect with the past participle.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.
Indefinite article, accusative neuter singular; determiner of 'Baby' (direct object).
Common noun, neuter singular; head of the accusative noun phrase (direct object).
Past participle of the lexical verb; with 'hat' forms the present perfect. In this collocation ('ein Baby bekommen') means to have a baby.

/diː ˈnaxbaːʁɪn hat ˈkʏʁtslɪç aɪ̯n ˈbeːbi bəˈkɔmən/
